quotes: Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.

asset_groups.name: Brand Wave Graphic Variants
asset_groups.semantics: Wave graphic device family: two colorways (Sunshine/Gold and Sky Blue/Deep Blue), each in long and short variants; top layer always at 70% transparency.

assets.description: Branded orange/yellow gradient PNG used as the full-width section background for the Gradient Callout CTA section; sized cover, no-repeat, centered, spanning 600px content width. Do not re-host or recolor. Fallback solid Sunshine #faa31b.

quotes: asset is `https://solstice-public-forever.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/design_library/12912e15-c371-4bf0-a5b9-08a7f8c57d20/7772aba5-1ff5-4985-80bf-c15b782111a4/Gradient_callout.png` — do not re-host or recolor.
the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized `cover`, `no-repeat`, centered, spanning the full content width (600px)

assets.description: LISRAYA logo mark; the icon's 70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances, including when the mark is used as a pattern/graphic. Sits at the lightest end of the masthead gradient.

quotes: The logo icon's **70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances**
Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end)

assets.description: Masthead gradient device (Sunshine → light gold 0C,10M,78Y,0K ≈ #ffe05c) with logo mark placed at the lightest end — the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions and for contrast with the logo mark.

quotes: **Masthead gradient — the gradient to use with the logo mark for contrast; mark sits at the lightest end**
Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.

assets.description: Brand accent shape: a rectangle with selectively enlarged opposite corner radii (large radius one diagonal pair, slight/6px radius the other). Core container device used to house callout text and photography.

quotes: A rectangle with **selectively enlarged opposite corner radii**; the other two corners keep a slight radius. Used to house callout text and photography.
large: 120px & 6px; banner: 48px & 6px; callout: 42px & 6px.

assets.description: Warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery — real moments of simple, everyday activity (walking the dog, beach, BBQ). Housed in the accent shape. Requires descriptive alt text.

quotes: Photography: **warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery** — real moments of simple, everyday activity (walking the dog, beach, BBQ).
Images are housed in the **Accent shape** (§2.5) — asymmetric rounded-corner crops

assets.description: White rounded-square icon badge holding a line icon (Brand Blue stroke), mirroring the accent shape at smaller scale (radius 20px 4px 20px 4px), with a subtle Dark Navy drop shadow. Straddles the left edge of the icon callout box.

quotes: a **White `#ffffff` rounded square** holding the line icon (Brand Blue stroke)
The white badge **mirrors the same accent shape at smaller scale**, `border-radius: 20px 4px 20px 4px;`

assets.description: Minimal line illustration icon set — consistent stroke weight, rounded line caps, single-color line work. Default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds; minimum render size 32×32px in email. Colors adjustable only within brand palette.

quotes: Style: **minimal line illustration** for clarity and quick recall.
minimum render size 32×32px in email; default Brand Blue strokes on light backgrounds

assets.description: CTA shape/treatment as an SVG with a horizontal linear gradient (light gold #FFDF55 → dark orange #FAA21B) filling an asymmetric rounded shape. Approved shape and treatment for CTAs.

quotes: use this shape and treatment for CTAs:
<stop stop-color="`#FFDF55`"/> <stop offset="1" stop-color="`#FAA21B`"/>

subtypes.best_for: Self-contained assembled section blocks that stack with zero gap

quotes: Each section is a self-contained `<table>`-based block at 600px with its own top/bottom 32px padding and declared background color; **no margins outside the section** — assembly is direct stacking.
sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly.

subtypes.name: Email / Modular Section Block

quotes: Locked components (header, footer, ISI) are inserted by the core team
live in the **locked header/footer components — never reproduce in sections.**

templates.description: Full-width banner with a centered Brand Blue headline in the top third and a single centered Deep Blue button (white label, Gold arrow) in the lower-middle, overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient PNG background (Sunshine fallback). Signature asymmetric button radius always required.

templates.description: A light-blue accent-shape box with a short blue headline and a white icon badge that straddles the box's left edge (50/50 over the box edge).
